about.heading: About Us
about.body:
Forever Bali Villas is a curated collection of owner-operated luxury villas designed for elevated stays in Bali. We have 2 stunning villas located overlooking Pandawa Beach, Forever Santai and Forever Pandawa.

Both our properties offer privacy, sweeping ocean views, and easy access to one of the island's most beautiful coastlines.

Each villa features six spacious bedrooms, six bathrooms, expansive living areas, a fully equipped kitchen, private infinity pool, and dedicated staff, with private chef services available on request. Perfect for retreats, intimate events, group celebrations, and family holidays, we combine genuine Balinese hospitality with refined comfort, creating stays that feel both exclusive and effortless.

hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.subtitle: Wondering how to book one of our beautiful Bali villas? Here are the most common questions from our guests.

items.question: What time is check-in and check-out?
items.answer: Check-in is from 3:00 PM onwards, and check-out is by 11:00 AM. We kindly ask guests to share their estimated arrival time or flight details in advance so we can prepare for a smooth welcome. Early check-in and late check-out requests must be made at least 24 hours in advance and are subject to availability.

items.question: Do you offer airport transfers?
items.answer: Yes — and we highly recommend booking your airport transfer with us. Forever Bali Villas is located within Gapura Vista Residences, a secluded clifftop estate where inner roads can be tricky to navigate and Google Maps is not always reliable. Airport transfers start from Rp 500,000 per car.

items.question: What is the check-in process?
items.answer: As a fully staffed private villa, a member of our team will be on-site to personally greet you upon arrival and guide you through a smooth and welcoming check-in. To ensure everything is prepared for you, we kindly ask that you provide your flight details or estimated arrival time in advance.

items.question: What is nearby?
items.answer: Forever Bali Villas is tucked away on the clifftops of Gapura Vista Residences, offering privacy and a peaceful atmosphere. Pandawa Beach is just a short drive away, and the popular areas of Bingin and Uluwatu are approximately 30 minutes away.

items.question: Is the Private Chef Mandatory? What is the fee?
items.answer: The private chef is not mandatory. Your stay already includes daily breakfast prepared by our team. If you'd like to enhance your experience, our private chef is available at Rp 1.8 million per day (excluding the cost of ingredients).

items.question: Do you offer in Villa Spa?
items.answer: Yes — we offer a range of in-villa spa treatments that can be enjoyed in the comfort and privacy of your villa. We recommend booking in advance to ensure therapist availability, especially during peak periods.

items.question: Do you offer excursions, tours, and bike rentals?
items.answer: Yes — we're happy to assist with arranging a wide range of excursions, tours, and transport options, including bike and scooter rentals. Simply let us know what you have in mind, and we'll take care of the arrangements for you.

cta.title: Still Have Questions?
cta.description: Our team is here to help. Reach out and we'll respond within 24 hours.

forever-pandawa.name: Forever Pandawa
forever-pandawa.description: Forever Pandawa is a stylish luxury villa designed for relaxed coastal living near Pandawa Beach. The villa features six spacious bedrooms and six bathrooms, sleeping 12 to 14 guests with added beds.
forever-pandawa.longDescription: Open-plan living and dining areas connect seamlessly to the outdoor spaces, creating an easy indoor–outdoor flow. The villa is fully equipped with a private infinity pool, high-speed Wi-Fi, air conditioning, and in-villa laundry. A fully staffed team including housekeeping and a personal chef is on hand to ensure an effortless stay.

forever-santai.name: Forever Santai
forever-santai.tagline: Newly Renovated and Ready for Your Stay
forever-santai.description: Forever Santai is a spacious three-story luxury villa designed for comfort, privacy, and effortless group living. The villa features six bedrooms and six bathrooms and can sleep 12 to 14 with added beds.
forever-santai.longDescription: Amenities include a fully equipped kitchen, indoor dining area, gym, infinity pool with sun deck, private spa room, movie room, ping-pong table, and high-speed Wi-Fi throughout. The villa is fully staffed and includes a private chef for seamless in-villa dining.

terms.subtitle: Summary of Site Usage Agreement, Service Terms, and Conditions
terms.intro: Welcome to Forever Bali Villas! By utilizing this official website of Forever Bali Villas, you acknowledge and agree to the following terms and conditions. These materials are provided by FBV – Forever Bali Villas, its subsidiaries, affiliates, and related entities, as a service to our valued customers and are intended for informational purposes only.

sections.title: Villa Rates and Prices
sections.body:
For the most precise and up-to-date official villa rates and prices, please visit our official website or contact our Reservation Center directly at +62 859 5417 3599 during Bali office hours (9 am – 5 pm, GMT+8).

Rate Display & Promotion

  • All prices are quoted and must be paid in Indonesian Rupiah (Rp).
  • Prices labelled "Net" or "Nett" include a tax and service charge, while prices indicated with "++" do not include / are subject to the tax and service charge.
  • Rates and prices are valid for standard double room occupancy or single occupancy for an extra bed, inclusive of breakfast, standard amenities, and services.
  • Daily villa prices are subject to fluctuation and may change without prior notice.

Rate Guarantee

We guarantee that you will obtain the best online deal by booking through our official website or by contacting us directly.

sections.title: Making a Reservation
sections.body:
To confirm your reservation, it is imperative to have an active and accessible email address. We will send your reservation/payment confirmation via email, which must be presented upon check-in.

Reservation Guarantee

To secure your villa reservation allocation, an advance payment/deposit is required. You can make a reservation through:

  1. Booking through the Website: Available 24/7. A valid credit card is required to confirm your booking.
  2. Booking through Email: Emails receive a response within 24 hours during office hours. Contact us at booking@foreverbalivillas.com.
  3. Booking through Phone: Call +62 81996488881 during office hours.

sections.title: Payment Method
sections.body:
• By Xendit: When booking through our official website, the system will guide you through the secure online payment process via Xendit.
  • By Bank Transfer: Upon request, we will send our official bank account details to your email. Bank transfer is not recommended for bookings made less than 14 days before arrival.
  • By ATM Transfer: ATM payment is applicable for Indonesian residents and local ATM use only, upon request.

A booking is not considered confirmed until FBV receives the payment as invoiced.

sections.title: Booking Amendments, Cancellations, No-Show, and Refund Policy
sections.body:
Modifying or cancelling your booking will be subject to the following policy:

50% Fee Applies

  • Low Season: Cancellation received within 13–7 days prior to arrival.
  • High Season (Jul 15 – Aug 31): Cancellation received within 20–14 days prior to arrival.
  • Peak Season (Dec 25 – Jan 5): Cancellation received within 30–21 days prior to arrival.

100% Fee Applies

  • Low Season: Cancellation received less than 7 days prior to arrival.
  • High Season (Jul 15 – Aug 31): Cancellation received less than 14 days prior to arrival.
  • Peak Season (Dec 25 – Jan 5): Cancellation received less than 21 days prior to arrival.

In the event of a No-Show or an Early Departure/Check-Out, the policy remains in effect.

Non-Refundable Policy

For LAST MINUTE SALE! rate plans, 100% payment is required at the time of booking. This is a Non-Refundable reservation and cannot be cancelled, amended, or modified.

Exceptions

In reasonable cases or circumstances beyond the control of the guest (force majeure, sickness, accident, death, flight delay/cancellation), we may consider rescheduling or waiving fees. Supporting documentation must be submitted. The final decision is solely at our discretion.

sections.title: Refund
sections.body: The timing of the refund process to your credit card or bank account depends on each bank's system and schedule (normally, up to 14 working days). Forever Bali Villas does not have control over when and how the money will be received in your account. However, we will process the refund as soon as it is required.

sections.title: Check-in / Check-out
sections.body:
Check-in time is 3:00 p.m. and check-out time is 11:00 a.m. Early check-in or late check-out is subject to availability and may incur an additional charge.

Upon Check-in, the following are required:

  • Booking confirmation email
  • Payment confirmation email
  • Valid government ID

Day Use

Day use or late check-out is subject to availability. A 50% charge from the applicable rate applies to late check-out until 6:00 p.m. Any extended stay exceeding 6:00 p.m. will be charged at the full rate.

sections.title: Copyright Notice
sections.body: Forever Bali Villas retains exclusive ownership of all rights, titles, and interest in the website and its content, including intellectual property rights. You are not permitted to resell, use, copy, monitor, display, publish, download, or otherwise use the content for any commercial or competitive activity or purpose without our express written permission.

sections.title: Communications
sections.body:
Regarding all communications sent to Forever Bali Villas, including feedback, questions, comments, and suggestions:

  • There is no confidentiality right applicable to Communications, and Forever Bali Villas has no obligation to protect Communications from disclosure.
  • Forever Bali Villas is free to reproduce, use, disclose, and distribute Communications to others.
  • Forever Bali Villas is free to use any ideas, concepts, know-how, or techniques contained in Communications for any purpose.

terms.footnote: Please Note: This page contains only the general policies. The latest version may not yet be updated on this page, and specific policies may be applied to certain bookings and offers.

privacy.intro: Forever Bali Villas ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting and respecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or make a reservation with us.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.body:
We may collect the following categories of personal information:

Personal Identification Information

  • Full name, email address, phone number, and postal address
  • Passport or government-issued ID details (required for check-in)
  • Date of birth and nationality

Booking & Payment Information

  • Reservation details including arrival/departure dates and special requests
  • Payment information (processed securely via third-party payment providers; we do not store full card numbers)
  • Transaction history and booking correspondence

Technical & Usage Data

  • IP address, browser type, device identifiers, and operating system
  • Pages visited, time spent on pages, and referring URLs
  • Cookie data and similar tracking technologies

Communications

  • Emails, WhatsApp messages, and other correspondence you send us
  • Feedback, reviews, and survey responses

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.body:
We use the information we collect for the following purposes:

  • To process and manage your reservation — confirming bookings, processing payments, and coordinating your arrival
  • To provide our services — including in-villa staff arrangements, transport, spa bookings, and concierge requests
  • To communicate with you — responding to enquiries, sending booking confirmations, and providing pre-arrival information
  • To comply with legal obligations — including immigration requirements, tax regulations, and applicable Indonesian law
  • To improve our services — analysing usage data to enhance website functionality and guest experience
  • To send marketing communications — only where you have given explicit consent or where permitted by law

sections.title: 3. Legal Basis for Processing (GDPR)
sections.body:
Where GDPR applies, we process your personal data on the following legal bases:

  • Contract performance — processing necessary to fulfil your reservation and provide our services
  • Legal obligation — compliance with applicable laws and regulations
  • Legitimate interests — improving services, fraud prevention, and security
  • Consent — for marketing communications and non-essential cookies. You may withdraw consent at any time.

sections.title: 4. Sharing Your Information
sections.body:
We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share your data with:

  • Service providers — payment processors, email service providers, and IT support
  • Booking platforms — third-party reservation systems (such as Cloudbeds) used to manage your booking
  • Legal authorities — where required by Indonesian law, court order, or government regulation
  • Professional advisers — lawyers, accountants, and insurers, where necessary and under confidentiality obligations

sections.title: 5. International Data Transfers
sections.body: Forever Bali Villas is based in Bali, Indonesia. If you are accessing our services from within the European Economic Area (EEA) or United Kingdom, your data may be transferred to and processed in Indonesia. We take appropriate safeguards to ensure such transfers comply with applicable data protection laws.

sections.title: 6. Cookies & Tracking Technologies
sections.body:
Our website uses cookies and similar technologies to enhance your browsing experience, analyse website traffic, and support our marketing activities.

Types of Cookies We Use

  • Strictly Necessary Cookies — essential for the website to function. These cannot be disabled.
  • Analytics Cookies — help us understand how visitors interact with the site. We only use these with your consent.
  • Marketing Cookies — used to deliver relevant advertisements. We only use these with your consent.

You can manage your cookie preferences at any time via our cookie consent banner or by adjusting your browser settings.

sections.title: 7. Data Retention
sections.body: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes outlined in this policy. Guest booking records are typically retained for a minimum of 5 years in accordance with Indonesian tax and business record-keeping requirements. Marketing data is held until you withdraw consent or unsubscribe.

sections.title: 8. Your Rights
sections.body:
Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the following rights regarding your personal data:

  • Right of access — to obtain a copy of your personal data
  • Right to rectification — to correct inaccurate or incomplete data
  • Right to erasure — to request deletion of your data, subject to legal obligations
  • Right to restriction — to limit how we process your data in certain circumstances
  • Right to data portability — to receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format
  • Right to object — to processing based on legitimate interests or for direct marketing
  • Right to withdraw consent — where processing is based on consent, you may withdraw it at any time

To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at bookings@foreverbalivillas.com. We will respond within 30 days.

sections.title: 9. Data Security
sections.body: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorised access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. These include SSL encryption for data transmission, access controls, and regular security assessments.

sections.title: 10. Third-Party Links
sections.body: Our website may contain links to third-party websites, including booking platforms and social media channels. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of those sites and encourage you to review their privacy policies independently.

sections.title: 11. Children's Privacy
sections.body: Our services are not directed to children under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If you believe we have inadvertently collected information from a child, please contact us immediately.

sections.title: 12. Changes to This Policy
sections.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by updating the "Last updated" date at the top of this page. Your continued use of our website following any changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

sections.title: 13. Contact Us
sections.body:
If you have any questions, concerns, or requests relating to this Privacy Policy, please contact us:

  • Forever Bali Villas
  • Gapura Vista Residences, Jl. Pura Masang Kelod
  • Nusa Dua Selatan, Badung, Bali, Indonesia
  • Email: bookings@foreverbalivillas.com
  • WhatsApp: +62 819 9648 8881

privacy.footnote: This Privacy Policy is provided for informational purposes and reflects our general data practices. For specific enquiries or to exercise your rights, please contact us directly.
